reviews.review_description: It is kind of boring and the Weapons not that good tbo I sorry but I’ll give it 3 stars and one more thing y’all need to bring more weapons.

developer_response.body: Totally agree  the weapons system is the first thing we're revamping for the next update so please stay tuned and we hope to add some more variables which will make the gameplay a bit more exciting.

reviews.review_description: This game has a unique style, charm, and is fun to play, great for an early development experience!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review !

reviews.review_description:
I played this over the weekend and it’s still got some work to be done , 
Fun to pick up and play , 
Easy tutorial, 
Then a choice of 3 levels in difficulty  
It’s not Drunken bar fights just remember that 

Martin76x

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback ! We'll continue expanding and polishing the gameplay

reviews.review_title: Wasnt able to pick anything up
reviews.review_description:
All the guns bounced away from my hands. Easy to jump between walls. Enemies were so dumb. Everything is bad. Bad bad bad


Edit: Good devs though! Two stars. You guys got this!

developer_response.body: We are so sorry you had such an awful experience with the app but we thank you for playing just the same !

reviews.review_description:
So I played this game and was very disappointed but I played it recently and was super stoked to see how much fun it has become 

Only thing I would say is add more maps and enemy types maybe even a climbing ability
if free moment and proper grips are added this game would be practically perfect

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and we will make an effort to incorporate Free Movement options and reconsider  our grips in future updates. This build was to see if there was interest in the game and our initial direction and it's encouraging to hear that some people do value  the vision though we still plan to invest a lot of work into making this a much better game. Thank you for support and stay tuned !

reviews.review_title: cant even get past the tutorial
reviews.review_description: this game is terrible one you drop your weapon you CANT pick it back up again.and the movement sucks

developer_response.body: We're very sorry We're revamping the grabbing system and fixing some height bugs we have with the floor to make it easier to grab and use weapons . Thank you for playing , we're also  looking into incorporating stick movement so updates are coming we appreciate the time you  spent playing our game and giving us feedback !
We're so sorry you had bad time would you be willing to share with us ways to improve the experience ?

reviews.review_description:
This Game wile not being a five star must have is pretty darn fun here’s why...

Wile the glitches here and there can be annoying but if you look past that and take the time to appreciate the effort of the devs and they time it takes to make this kind of game it’s got a lot in store

The guns are pretty unique and all have their own quality’s and preform differently depending on the use

The maps are not the best but you can tell they’re giving their best

Also the models are super cool and are super interesting 

Great game to play around in just needs a bit here and there 
But other than that

7/10
Coolest in development shooter on oculus

-PlugN

developer_response.body: First of all thank you for the very kind and thorough review We're planning on releasing a lot of updates and improvements and hope you come back i an few months so that hopefully we can earn that last star.  This review made us laugh and smile and  so thank you for playing our experience and we hope we can make it worth the thought you put into this analysis . We appreciate your support  and we'll keep improving !

reviews.review_description: Make the drinks drinkable beer can able to spray out beer maybe

developer_response.body: Excellent suggestion and one of the things our Designer is focusing on is making drinkable items  because in the middle of the gunfight why not take a refreshing drink ? We appreciate the feedback and suggestion !

reviews.review_description: I love the concepts, but all guns feel the same other than the sword, it has many bugs like weapons falling trough the ground etc. it would be one of the coolest games with a bit of work, but from now on i gotta give it 3 stars

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and we appreciate the insight on the weapons  our next major update is centered on upgrading our weapons system . We hope you check back in in a few months when we have upgraded the weapons and created some systems to give the experience more longevity.  We look forward to earning those last 2 stars !

reviews.review_title: Good buts needs to be worked on
reviews.review_description: Like make it like a real bar and not were you fight them off start and add more weapons i feel this game has a lot of potential but it’s is good for the amount of people working on it right now.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback and support we'll definitely focus on making the bar feel a bit more natural .

reviews.review_title: It’s a little too early for release
reviews.review_description: The game has good mechanics on the line of the point and move system but tbh it’s a little bland, Ik the weapons are going to get better but it’s too early to release this game to the public because it will just give it a bad reputation from the start, better character models are needed, better sounds better room scaling better brightness just overall needs to be better, has a lot of potential if you would keep it in dev stages and not release it, overall good job guys

developer_response.body:
Thank you We appreciate your support and kind compliments, the value of this release was finding ways to make this a better game and figure out what works well to start with .

The project is definitely a bit undercooked at the moment but feedback like yours helps us make it into something more worthwhile down the road. thank you very much  and we hope you check back in for our next update !
